inputs.text:
[Scene Style]: Midday, Clear sky with thin clouds, Bright natural sunlight, Arid desert landscape with scattered snow patches.

[Perspective]: Low-angle ground vehicle camera view, Wide-angle lens, Vanishing point located generally central on the horizon line where the road disappears.

[Ground & Path]: Wide, unpaved dirt road marked with deep parallel tire ruts and textured soil. The road geometry exhibits a complex winding trend as it recedes into the distance: it starts centrally in the foreground, curves slightly toward the right in the midground, and then bends back toward the left before disappearing over a distant rise at the horizon. Patches of white snow and ice line the road edges throughout.

[Key Elements]:

Foreground: Heavily rutted dirt track surface with snow patches on the immediate left and right shoulders.

Midground: The distinct S-shaped curving path of the dirt road winding through dry desert scrub land.

Background: A distant, hazy mountain range spanning the horizon under a pale blue sky with light clouds.
